---
title: "test_1772477497.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/gauntlet/test_1772477497.py"
loc: 6
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 8.05
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.10
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic.

## Interaction Protocol
Import module and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
